title: URGENT CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: SAMARITAN WALK-IN CLINIC NEWPORT URGENT CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for minor illnesses or injuries that do not require hospitalization but need direct attention. 705 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm and 1:50pm-6:30pm, Saturday-Sunday 9am-1pm and 1:50pm-5:30pm (541) 574-4860 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 574-4860 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP (InterCommunity Health Network CCO), Medicare, and private insurances. All self-pay visits require an up-front $50 payment. Financial assistance and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Urgent Care Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAMARITAN WALK-IN CLINIC NEWPORT
